seo.title: Kraken Crypto Market Scraper Tool for Structured Web Data
seo.description: Fetch current public Kraken ticker data for a cryptocurrency pair including bid, ask, last, volume, VWAP, trades, low, and high. Better Fetch returns clean structured records ready for agents, exports, monitoring, and downstream workflows.
seo.intro: Fetch current public Kraken ticker data for a cryptocurrency pair including bid, ask, last, volume, VWAP, trades, low, and high. This first-party Better Fetch tool turns a focused request into predictable structured output that can be inspected in the web workspace, exported as JSON or CSV, called through REST, or composed by an AI agent over MCP. It is designed for repeatable production research rather than fragile copy-and-paste scraping.

useCases.title: Agent research
useCases.description: Give AI agents bounded, normalized kraken crypto market scraper results without writing source-specific retrieval and parsing code.

useCases.title: Repeatable monitoring
useCases.description: Save the configuration, rerun it on a consistent source, and export comparable structured artifacts for operational review.

faqs.question: What does Kraken Crypto Market Scraper return?
faqs.answer: It returns normalized structured fields documented in the output schema, plus the fetched source URL and a record count for receipts and exports.

faqs.question: Does this tool store the retrieved output?
faqs.answer: No. Better Fetch records privacy-safe run metadata for reliability and retention analysis, but the output payload itself is not stored by the workspace.

pair.description: Kraken asset pair such as XBTUSD, ETHUSD, or SOLUSD.
